Description: Astral Ray — fires a beam of starlight that weakens the target's resistance with each hit.
DescriptionEn: Astral Ray — fires a beam of starlight that weakens the target's resistance with each hit.
DescriptionFr: Rayon astral — tire un rayon de lumière stellaire qui affaiblit la résistance de la cible à chaque coup.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 70 magic damage to one enemy; enemy takes +25% more damage for 4 turns (stacks each cast); 2-turn cooldown.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 70 magic damage to one enemy; enemy takes +25% more damage for 4 turns (stacks each cast); 2-turn cooldown.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 70 dégâts magiques à un ennemi ; l'ennemi subit +25 % de dégâts supplémentaires pendant 4 tours (cumulable à chaque lancer) ; temps de recharge de 2 tours.
